keyFindings: App.tsx handleSubmitCreateDialog calls createWorktree and then automatically creates first session
Session is created with worktree path as cwd
Worktree is created from default branch (not current checkout)
Ctrl+N keyboard shortcut opens create dialog
Welcome screen renders with Ctrl+N shortcut visible
Real end-to-end test creates sibling worktree and persists record
Collision handling creates unique branch names when needed

notes: All assertions validated through comprehensive test coverage. The fix-real-create-worktree-submission-flow feature properly implements the real end-to-end create-worktree submission flow.
